title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Orissa (Alteration of Name) Act, 2011. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st November, 2011, vide notification No. G.S.R. 791(E), dated 1st November, 2011, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (i).
